basic_details.job_title: NIO Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The CSIR National Institute of Oceanography (CSIR NIO) has officially announced the Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 with 2 openings under Advt. No. GAP003838/3252-26. Candidates holding a B.E./ B.Tech (Civil), M.E./ M.Tech in the relevant discipline, M.Sc. in Physical Oceanography, or a Ph.D. in Oceanography/Marine Science with the prescribed experience are eligible to apply online until 26 July 2026. Candidates should refer to the official notification for age limit details. Direct links to download the official notification and apply online are shared below.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech / M.E (Ocean Engineering / Marine structures / Coastal Management / Marine Engineering & Management/ Dredging & Harbour Engineering / Coastal & Harbour Engineering or Equivalent) with 2 years experience, B.E / B.Tech (Civil) with minimum 3 years experience, M.Sc Physical Oceanography with minimum 3 years experience, Ph.D (Oceanography / Marine Science) with minimum 2 years post PhD experience
qualification.details: M.Tech / M.E (Ocean Engineering / Marine structures / Coastal Management / Marine Engineering & Management/ Dredging & Harbour Engineering / Coastal & Harbour Engineering or Equivalent) with 2 years of post M.E/ M.Tech experience OR B.E / B.Tech (Civil) with a minimum 3 years of post B.E/ B.Tech experience OR M.Sc Physical Oceanography or equivalent with a minimum 3 years post M.Sc experience OR Ph.D (Oceanography / Marine Science) with a minimum 2 years post PhD experience

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIO Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 26-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIO to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download NIO Senior Project Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

content_sections.heading: NIO Senior Project Associate Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NIO Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NIO Senior Project Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIO Senior Project Associate Vacancy Details 2026
NIO Senior Project Associate Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: M.Tech / M.E (Ocean Engineering / Marine structures / Coastal Management / Marine Engineering & Management/ Dredging & Harbour Engineering / Coastal & Harbour Engineering or Equivalent) with 2 years of post M.E/ M.Tech experience OR B.E / B.Tech (Civil) with a minimum 3 years of post B.E/ B.Tech experience OR M.Sc Physical Oceanography or equivalent with a minimum 3 years post M.Sc experience OR Ph.D (Oceanography / Marine Science) with a minimum 2 years post PhD experience

content_sections.heading: NIO Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
NIO Senior Project Associate Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIO Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 26-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIO to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIO Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIO Senior Project Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the NIO Senior Project Associate recruitment is 26th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Project Associate post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies available for the Senior Project Associate post at NIO.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Senior Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Senior Project Associate position will receive a salary of Rs. 42,000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualifications include M.Tech/M.E, B.E/B.Tech, M.Sc, or Ph.D. in relevant fields with specified years of experience.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the NIO Senior Project Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is strictly online through the official NIO website.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the National Institute of Oceanography (CSIR-NIO) located?
faq.answer: The National Institute of Oceanography (CSIR-NIO) is located in Goa.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at the National Institute of Oceanography (CSIR-NIO).

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article or via the NIO official website.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is GAP003838/3252-26.
